headline: Illumina Regeneron Alliance Targets Multiomics And Raises Valuation Questions
summary: Illumina (NasdaqGS:ILMN) expanded its Alliance for Genomic Discovery by adding Regeneron Genetics Center. The partners launched a large-scale program to pair whole genome sequences with proteomic data. The collaboration aims to speed up drug discovery and support multiomic research with participation from GSK and Amgen. The initiative focuses on more diverse genetic datasets and advanced molecular insights to support precision medicine. Illumina, best known for its DNA sequencing platforms...
